text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the Japanese Oaks! I've been
looking forward to it so much that I've even been
dreaming about it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In my dreams, the others all run like the wind. My
attire flaps intensely as I'm overtaken...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It feels so refreshing that I start to run faster too!
And then...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's a secret. ♪ You'll just have to wait and
see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the second race in the Triple Tiara tour,
yet Fine Motion doesn't appear particularly
nervous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Groan... Sniffle. This really is impossible. I knew it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the runners who raced in the Oka Sho is
crouched by the side of the path in tears. She
entered the race shouldering great expectations,
but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...
Could you wait a moment, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hello.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Fine...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Relax and take some deep breaths. In... and out...

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I... I'm afraid... I'm afraid I'm going to disappoint
everyone again...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We won't know until we start. Here, give us a
smile.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...
A smile?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We get to race today. Let's enjoy it. ♪ If you can
do that, then I'm sure—

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But this is the Japanese Oaks! It's a G1 race with
so much history. Everyone has such high
expectations...

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can just... enjoy it. You wouldn't
understand, Fine. Even if you lose, you still have
other things waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...!
I'm sorry! That was rude...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No, you're correct. To be frank, I really can't
relate to your unease.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: For me, every race is fresh and incredibly fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The very act of running makes my heart pound
with joy. There's nothing scary about it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Still, even I understand that this race—and the
Triple Tiara tour—are special.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Running here is surely like a dream come true. But
that's precisely why I want you to enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: After all, this is your race, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's true that racing is not everything that I have.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But right now, at this very moment, I'd like it to
be. ...This is my only chance, after all.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want all of us who are running
together to be in the best shape we can be.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want it to be a wonderful race—with all of us
sweeping down the track like a rushing wind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I just realized that I'm making some rather
presumptuous requests.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time anyone's encouraged me for
my own sake.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But... is it really okay for me to think about myself
like that? Is it really okay to run for myself?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course! You're the star here!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's time! ♪
Bye, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list: You go out there and run for yourself too.
You go out there and run for yourself too.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Okay, I'm off!
